title: StaffDerpsMod
description: Staff Utility Mod for teleporting thru blocks and summoning entities.
body:
StaffDerpsMod
===============

For summoning mobs/entities and teleporting, you will need /tp and /summon perms

Teleports to where you look and can also teleport thru blocks, summons mobs and shoot them as a cannon, shows invisible players and pets

Config keybind: K + C

If you have questions or need help with something, the fastest way to get answers is to join [Discord](https://discord.gg/VTHVVgt "Discord"), otherwise put them on my github incase of crashes/bugs [click here](https://github.com/vacla/staffderpsmod/issues "click here")

## Want to support development?
If you want to support development, check out my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/Annevdl29 "Patreon")! Supporting me via Patreon lets me spend more time modding, and allows me to put out more updates for everyone to enjoy.

Credit to [Heather](https://twitter.com/heather7196 "Heather") for the logo.
